text.title: google-pmax Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for google-pmax. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Always provide maximum asset diversity: 5 headlines, 5 long headlines, 4+ descriptions, 3-5 distinct images, and at least one video.
rule.rationale: Google's algorithm learns by testing combinations. Few assets limit its ability to optimize.

rule.statement: Start with broad audience signals and let conversion data refine over 4-6 weeks. Do not apply strict demographic filters upfront.
rule.rationale: Overly narrow targeting constrains the algorithm's ability to discover high-converting audiences it would not have found manually.

rule.statement: Allocate budget conservatively at campaign start. PMax needs 3x the target CPA as daily budget for a proper learning phase.
rule.rationale: Insufficient budget prevents the algorithm from gathering enough data to optimize effectively.

rule.statement: Never pause and restart a campaign frequently. Allow at least 2-3 weeks between major changes to avoid resetting learning.
rule.rationale: The algorithm requires stability to optimize; constant restarts prevent convergence.
